PluginData.Author: Viktor Ferenczi
PluginData.Tooltip: Server-side support for building and repairing multigrid projections. Pairs with the Multigrid Projector client plugin.
PluginData.Description:
Server-side plugin for Multigrid Projector. Enables full multigrid projection welding and repair for all players on the server.
Install it via Quasar (the Magnetar control plane), or into a standalone Magnetar by editing its profile. Configure it remotely from Quasar.
For help, troubleshooting and bug reports join the SE Mods Discord: https://discord.gg/PYPFPGf3Ca
